summary: Backend-only regression + PYX ledger fixes suite. 11/11 pytest cases PASSED. Validated FIX 1 (wallet/withdraw atomic conditional debit), FIX 2 (pyx/transfer atomic debit + concurrency: 2 simultaneous full-balance transfers → exactly 1 success, 1 400 insufficient, final balance = 0, never negative), FIX 3 (pix-orders approve idempotent claim: double-approve returns already=approved with NO duplicate credit and exactly 1 wallet_tx), FIX 4 (staff/team password change: master admin blocked with .env explanation, support account password change succeeds and new pw works on /api/auth/login). Regressions OK: /api/auth/login master, /api/members/login master, /api/ads returns ads with seller_nickname + seller_tier enriched.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 7619 lines — consider splitting into modules (wallet, pyx, staff, members, ads) per <700 lines guideline.
wallet/withdraw and pyx/transfer correctly use find_one_and_update with $gte condition — atomicity verified under concurrency (asyncio.gather).
pix-orders approve correctly claims order before credit; second attempt returns {ok:true, already:'approved'} without side effects — verified via wallet_tx count and balance delta.
staff/team/{user_id}/password correctly compares email case-insensitively to os.environ.get('ADMIN_EMAIL') to block master edits.
seed_data_creation: Test creates ephemeral TEST members/wallets/users/pix_orders directly in Mongo (prefix mbr_test_, user_, ord_TEST_) and cleans them up on fixture teardown. No real production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PYX ledger integrity is now atomic. If regressions to catalog purchase (/api/pyx/buy ~2105) or ad buy-pyx (~3226) are needed, follow same pattern: seed a TEST member+wallet with known balance_centavos in Mongo, hit endpoint, assert 400 vs 200 + balance delta. Not covered in this iteration per request note (payload complexity — flagged as skipped).
rca_of_issue: N/A — all fixes verified working. FIX 2 concurrency test explicitly reproduced the double-spend race: sender starts with 100000 centavos, two parallel requests each debit 100000; the $gte-guarded find_one_and_update lets only one match while the other returns None → HTTP 400 'Saldo insuficiente'. Final balance = 0, no negative saldo possible.
